'''mamozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalmbook|psalmbook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalmbook|psalmbook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mamozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæmezheth|mæmezheth]] || [[word:mæmezhej|mæmezhej]] || [[word:mæmezhesh|mæmezhesh]] || [[word:mæmezhe|mæmezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamomozhoth|mamomozhoth]] || [[word:mamomozhoj|mamomozhoj]] || [[word:mamomozhosh|mamomozhosh]] || [[word:mamomozho|mamomozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamozhoth|mamozhoth]] || [[word:mamozhoj|mamozhoj]] || [[word:mamozhosh|mamozhosh]] || [[word:mamozho|mamozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamofzhoth|mamofzhoth]] || [[word:mamofzhoj|mamofzhoj]] || [[word:mamofzhosh|mamofzhosh]] || [[word:mamofzhof|mamofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mamozhotho|mamozhotho]] || [[word:mamozhojo|mamozhojo]] || [[word:mamozhosho|mamozhosho]] || [[word:mamozhoko|mamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mamozhoth|mamozhoth]] || [[word:mamozhoj|mamozhoj]] || [[word:mamozhosh|mamozhosh]] || [[word:mamozho|mamozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mamozhothol|mamozhothol]] || [[word:mamozhojol|mamozhojol]] || [[word:mamozhoshol|mamozhoshol]] || [[word:mamozhokol|mamozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mamozhothotho|mamozhothotho]] || [[word:mamozhojojo|mamozhojojo]] || [[word:mamozhoshosho|mamozhoshosho]] || [[word:mamozhoko|mamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mamozhothon|mamozhothon]] || [[word:mamozhojon|mamozhojon]] || [[word:mamozhoshon|mamozhoshon]] || [[word:mamozhokon|mamozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mamozhothoro|mamozhothoro]] || [[word:mamozhojoro|mamozhojoro]] || [[word:mamozhoshoro|mamozhoshoro]] || [[word:mamozhokoro|mamozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
